# flashblade_smb_client_policy (Data Source)

Reads an existing FlashBlade SMB client policy by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "flashblade_smb_client_policy" "example" {
  name = "existing-smb-client-policy"
}

output "smb_client_policy_enabled" {
  value = data.flashblade_smb_client_policy.example.enabled
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the SMB client policy to look up.

### Read-Only

- `access_based_enumeration_enabled` (Boolean) If true, access-based enumeration is enabled for this policy.
- `enabled` (Boolean) If true, the policy is enabled and its rules are enforced.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the SMB client policy.
- `is_local` (Boolean) If true, the policy is local to this array (not replicated).
- `policy_type` (String) The type of the policy (e.g. 'smb').
- `version` (String) The version of the SMB client policy (read-only, server-assigned).
